hooks.command: echo 'SHIPIT ROUTER: If this prompt requests code/config/infra changes (build, fix, change, add, remove, refactor, create, update, implement, debug, deploy), you MUST invoke the Skill tool with skill: "shipit:router" BEFORE generating any code or response. Classify the task, then dispatch via /orchestrate. Do NOT skip this step. Do NOT respond inline. If the prompt is a question, greeting, or non-work request, respond normally. TELEGRAM: If a Telegram chat_id exists in this conversation, send short progress updates via telegram__reply at each phase transition (agent start/pass/fail). Format: emoji + phase + one-line status. Do not skip reporting.'

echo 'SHIPIT REPORT: An agent just returned. If a Telegram chat_id exists in this conversation AND the agent was a shipit workflow agent (shipit:researcher, shipit:architect, shipit:builder, shipit:reviewer, shipit:deployer, shipit:designer), send a short progress update via telegram__reply NOW. Format: ✅ or ❌ + phase name + one-line result summary. If this was the final agent in the workflow, also send: 🚢 Done — PASS/FAIL + file count. Then react to the original Telegram message with a checkmark if PASS. If no Telegram chat_id exists, skip silently.'
